subject: [Pre-read] Reg CB LFF/ CNLS/ Projects Monthly Update - Sep 2025
deck_filename: Reg CB LFF_CNLS_Projects Monthly Catchup - Sep 2025 vf.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please find attached slides for our discussion tomorrow, let me know for
any questions.

Slide 65 is currently WIP and will be completed by tomorrow morning.

Thank you

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB | MY & SG CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

Hi Ian, all,

Please find attached updated slides for our discussion later.

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 6 - 7

   - Probably should show more updated numbers. Are we on targets here for
   Aug/Sep?

Slide 10

   - TH do not want to give 6 months free?
- Where did we land on locking sellers in for the long term?

And to suss
   out those that will leave in 6 months?

Slide 11

   - For those who say yes for MY and not for SG, will we still be able to
   sell to SG?

The difference is about 600 sellers right now



Slide 14

   - How do we prevent having too many of undecided?

Slide 17

   - What is the overlap and concentration of CB FBS sellers right now?

Is
   there a strong overlap for them to have a WH in CN just for storage and
   replenishment?

Slide 18

   - What is the difference in ATP % definition right now?

Slide 21

   - There is cost savings from local as well right?

When we store in CN,
   we can store less in local, so we can actually calculate the savings we get
   there
   - Why do we need to bear BS cost when it is in CN?

We can just return to
   sellers?

Slide 23

   - Are these sellers already in our local WHs?
- Did we check if this is a common practice for local 3PFs/enablers?

content.answer:
Allocate & align ownership of key levers and set timeline for
implementation. Ray 26 Sep
4 Counter TB Share with CN SMT a consolidated list of sellers who are
applying Air/Air-Heavy/Sea/Sea-Heavy rates that is not optimized for seller
item profile.
Educate seller to apply correct rates and improve their assortment pricing.
Jason 15 Sep

Hi Ian, all,

Please see follow ups from our discussion yesterday, let me know if any
questions.

No. Topic Action Items PIC DDL
1 CB FBS Check the feasibility to opt in MYSG automatically for sellers who
joined MY FBS, but not SG Jason 26 Sep
2 CB FBS new Anbo model To size the potential market of Anbo new model and
align with SCS for value proposition Jason 26 Sep
3 CNLS Site expansion 1. Aim for ambitious target, and align allocation
with CN/SIP/local CNLS teams.
2. Allocate & ali
